narrative:
Liberty Township (precinct in Mercer County) has 581 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.5 percentage points.
